Laws</tr_> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Amh.:55:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55.15</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii B.C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
